issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path usage.
Installation instructions rely on brew, which may not be available on all platforms, indicating minor platform assumptions.

scenarios.name: Shared remote state and provider inheritance across accounts
scenarios.rationale: Baseline duplicates backend.tf per module and lacks the generate/include/path_relative_to_include patterns; treatment uses all three to inherit a single root config.

scenarios.name: Orchestrate VPC, database, and ECS API with dependency wiring
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relies on terraform_remote_state and manual ordering; treatment declares dependency blocks and uses terragrunt run-all apply to deploy in dependency order.
